'''badhoko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kade|kade]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-dh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kade|kade]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| badhoko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bædheketh|bædheketh]] || [[word:bædhekej|bædhekej]] || [[word:bædhekesh|bædhekesh]] || [[word:bædheke|bædheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:badhodhokoth|badhodhokoth]] || [[word:badhodhokoj|badhodhokoj]] || [[word:badhodhokosh|badhodhokosh]] || [[word:badhodhoko|badhodhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:badhokoth|badhokoth]] || [[word:badhokoj|badhokoj]] || [[word:badhokosh|badhokosh]] || [[word:badhoko|badhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:badhofkoth|badhofkoth]] || [[word:badhofkoj|badhofkoj]] || [[word:badhofkosh|badhofkosh]] || [[word:badhofkof|badhofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:badhokotho|badhokotho]] || [[word:badhokojo|badhokojo]] || [[word:badhokosho|badhokosho]] || [[word:badhokoko|badhokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:badhokoth|badhokoth]] || [[word:badhokoj|badhokoj]] || [[word:badhokosh|badhokosh]] || [[word:badhoko|badhoko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:badhokothol|badhokothol]] || [[word:badhokojol|badhokojol]] || [[word:badhokoshol|badhokoshol]] || [[word:badhokokol|badhokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:badhokothotho|badhokothotho]] || [[word:badhokojojo|badhokojojo]] || [[word:badhokoshosho|badhokoshosho]] || [[word:badhokoko|badhokoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:badhokothon|badhokothon]] || [[word:badhokojon|badhokojon]] || [[word:badhokoshon|badhokoshon]] || [[word:badhokokon|badhokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:badhokothoro|badhokothoro]] || [[word:badhokojoro|badhokojoro]] || [[word:badhokoshoro|badhokoshoro]] || [[word:badhokokoro|badhokokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
